title: Student Speak | Galgotias University Placements
content: Galgotias University is committed to student success through excellent placement support and modern learning approaches. The university partners with top companies to offer internships and job opportunities. Faculty members play a key role by constantly upgrading their teaching methods, incorporating digital tools, and mentoring students through hands-on projects. Their dedicated efforts ensure a strong academic foundation and real-world readiness. These combined initiatives help students stay ahead in today’s competitive industry landscape. Sincerely, Awadhesh Pandey B.Tech-CSE-AI&DS | 2024-25 Placed : CISCO I am a recent graduate of Galgotias University's Computer Science program and am now working at Cisco, thanks to the education and support I received at the university. The faculty are highly knowledgeable and supportive, and the curriculum is designed to provide a practical learning experience. The university's modern facilities and industry partnerships have also been instrumental in developing my skills. I would highly recommend Galgotias University to anyone looking to pursue a degree in Computer Science. Admission No - 18SCSE1010402 Sincerely, Sagar Gulati B.Tech-CSE | 2018-22 Placed : CISCO Galgotias college has a very good and highly motivated placement cell which ensures that every student gets multiple opportunities to get a good job and kick-start their career. College placement cell also provided the company's specific training to the students so that they can start their careers with their dream organization. Apart from placement, the faculty of the college always support me to learn coding, and aptitude which will benefit me in the interviews. I am thankful to the college for providing me with such a great opportunity to work as a software developer at Autodesk. Sincerely, Tanishk Merothiya B.Tech – CSE | 2019-23 Placed : Autodesk I would like to thank Galgotias University for providing me with a job opportunity, please find below my testimonial. Galgotias University has always been a great place to learn and uplift ourselves. The academic structure and support from staff members refined us to give our complete potential to achieve greater positions in life. Exposure to various projects, hackathons and research work got me a good internship and a placement in a well-organised company. I will always be grateful to the placement cell for remotely running the placement drive and providing ample opportunities to pick the best job role at an industry-leading organization Thank You Lakshya Bansal Btech-CSE | 2018-2022 Placed : Capillary Technologies Thank you Galgotias University for giving me a platform where I nuture myself and I am very thankful to placement cell and our teachers for supporting and guiding me in every step.The placement team provides prior training and works as a bridge between students and potential companies. The placement training has helped me get placed in one of reputed companies, L&T Technology Services . Galgotias university offers exposure to students through various curriculum, non-curriculum and industry-related activities that help them choose their future field or industry. Kartik Chaudhary B.Tech- ME | 2019-23 Placed : L&T Special thankful to my. Placement cell that they have helped me a lot in my placement drive. GU has given many new placement opportunities and now I get placed in SOTI Company, Not only this ,the environment of GU is very warm and homely to study and grow our better future. Ankit Sharma B.Tech-EC | 2019-23 Placed : SOTI Dream came true, when offer letter from Nokia roll out in the inbox. Thanks to Placement cell, Galgotias University and teachers for the campus to corporate support they provided. In the intense period of recession and layoffs they provided wonderful learning and job opportunity with the MNC like nokia. Their best efforts helped infact all of us to get placed to top MNCs and global leaders of IT sector. Vani Chug B.Tech- 2019-23 Placed : Nokia “My sincere appreciation & gratitude to the Training & Placement Department and all Faculty members of GalgotiasCampus for their efforts in imparting quality managerial and aptitude training. I am very grateful to them for effectively and sincerely helping me to grab an opportunity i.e Reliance Industries Limited and the package is 9 LPA." Shivendra Pratap Singh Batch - MBA (2020-2022) Placed with Reliance BP Mobility Limited “I want to express my gratitude to all my professors of Galgotias University for their valuable assistance and support . I would also like to express my gratitude to Galgotias University Placement Cell for providing me this fantastic opportunity. Looking forward to an amazing journey at HSO India.” Samir Anand Batch - MBA (2020-2022) Placed withHSO India "Opportunity doesn't happen you create them." Galgotia is a true land of opportunities and I am highly glorified to be a part of it . I would like to thank all my faculty members and placement cell toprovide me this job to start my career with.” Shubham Gautam Batch - MBA (2020-2022) Placed with Berger Paints Limited “I'm extremely thrilled to announce that today I've joined Home First Finance Company Ltd. (HFFC).The whole process of selection was very smooth, and I would like to thank the recruiting team of Home First Finance Company for such smooth recruiting process. My sincere thanks to the Placement and Training Cell of Galgotias for their tremendous support and guidance during college placement drives.” Rishu Kumar Tiwari Batch - MBA (2020-2022) Placed with Home First Finance Company Ltd. “Special kudos to Placement cell, who took a number of measures to ensure that students get ample opportunity to pick the best option to start their Career despite the adverse condition arising presently due to Covid- 19. Hence, their best effort led to placement of most of the students, including mine in TCS company. Galgotias University gives great opportunities to its students and polishes them to lead a better life. Not only this, we all students get a homely/pressure-free/ smooth environment to enjoy our studies.” Ayush Pratap Singh Batch - MBA (2020-2022) Placed with Tata Consultancy Services Ltd. “I got placed in TCS, I express my heartfelt thanks to the Training & Placement team of my Galgotias university. I am very grateful to them for effectively and sincerely helping me to grab first ever opportunity of my career. Galgotias University has provided me with a number of opportunities to grow and explore my skills. Thanks to placement cell for captivating many prestigious firms and helping me during the recruitment process and hence I would like to specially thank the placement cell for guiding me and providing me a good platform for my career.” Vinay Singh Batch - MBA (2020-2022) Placed with Tata Consultancy Services Ltd.
